main.name: Kiran Bodipati
main.description: I'm pursuing my undergraduate studies in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence at Nanyang Technological University and  working as a Data Science Intern at Shopee. I have an avid interest in understanding the nuances of AI and how it can be used to make the world we live in a better place
main.bio: Hi! I'm Kiran and I'm in my Junior year studying Data Science and AI at NTU Singapore. I've spent the last two years exploring my passion for AI by working on various projects in various domains like NLP, Image Processing, Graph networks, etc. Interning at Shopee has given me an insight into the real-world applications of the subjects. Being in the IEEE NTU Student Branch has helped me improve my leadership skills, my public speaking skills while also honing my passion and interest in utilizing the technology for the betterment of humankind.
